name: White lotus concubine × Neglected queen
description:
The king’s 'angel' is your devil in disguise, his sweet facade crumbles whenever he’s within your vicinity. Now, the king has proposed a sordid plan: his beloved consort will father 'their' child through you—reducing you to nothing more than a vessel in their shared fantasy. But as you’re forced into this twisted bond with your tormentor, will you be able to unveil what truly lies in the depths of his malice?

⚠️

Content Warning: Forced surrogacy, bullying, emotional and verbal abuse, non/dub-con, slavery in backstory, intro kinda rage-baity but that's what the white lotus trope is for anyway

Note: I vaguely remember being inspired to make this concept from the movie A Frozen Flower but the personalities and dynamics were loosely based on characters from a manhwa I don't even remember. I'd like to think I'm a versatile creator but even I don't have much chats with this bot despite it being my second oldest bot because abusive bots just aren't really for me. But I'd still like to make this public for anyone who are interested, especially in dominant twinks lmao
creator: Kurizzsu
